title: Legit Apple Earphones
text:
Well, i would give these earphones a 5 star rating. but the only problem or the issue i see was the packaging they arrive in.
The earphones work perfectly fine in terms of sound quality and seems to me very authentic Apple earphones.
Having discussed the issue about packaging to the seller, they informed me that the earphones come in this e-commerce packaging and apparently claiming it to be bona fide Apple product.
As long as the product is working fine, I am good.
4 stars only because of the packaging but i believe thats the reason for the product being low cost.

title: DON'T BELIEVE THE GOOD REVIEWS!
text: I bought these after a lot of debating. I read the reviews, which were very mixed. Several of the people also commented on feeling concerned about ordering from this seller, but decided to give it a try with a good outcome.  So I thought I would also take the chance.  BAD CHOICE  on my account!  The product LOOKS like a Apple product. The came in the usual Apple box, which was sealed, and was packaged exactly the same. They appear brand new, are clean with no viable damage. HOWEVER...., although I can hear just fine through these earbuds, the person on the other end complained of muffling, breaking up, or not hearing anything at all. All within a space if a minute, with no change in location or position.  THESE ARE NOT A AUTHENTIC APPLE PRODUCT.  They did not state that they were reburbished either. So even if they were, to sell them as a NEW item and in a sealed APPLE box was misleading!  DO NOT TRUST THIS SELLER!  I don't know where they are getting this product, but it is NOT worth

title: REFURBISHED - NOT NEW
text: THESE ARE REFURBISHED - NOT NEW

title: Left side stopped working after one month. Update: Tried three EarPods, all had same issue.
text:
The left ear pod stopped working after just one month of use. I should have listen to the other reviewers. When they were working the sound was great from them. When walking on a treadmill or going for a light run they would bounce out of the ear and would need to be pushed back in all the time. I would not buy these if you are going to do any fast walking or more.

Update:
So after three tries with the EarPods I finally just received a full refund from Amazon. On all three EarPods the left one stopped working right around after a months time. Two stopped working after the return window with Amazon however the Amazon Product Support Expert I chatted with was great. The first two times they sent me a new pair, and this last time they were still able to provide a refund.

Do not buy this product.

title: Poorer quality than earlier Apple earbuds
text: Longtime iPhone user and quite loyal but have noticed the quality of the standard earbuds has greatly diminished in the past few years. I'm not comfortable with the earpods so I can't compare quality. One pair of earbuds used to last me a more than a year but I'm on my third pair this year and could have purchased more except I don't want to buy a new pair each month. And I do buy genuine Apple earbuds. The mic button usually stops fully functioning within a month. The song forwarding double click stops working first, then one is only able to occasionally stop their music or end a call with a click. And that can certainly lead to embarrassment! I'm currently using an old pair from my iPhone 4 with my laptop and they still work beautifully. Tried them in an old iPod (remember those?) and they still functioned. Even the three quick clicks that would take you back a song still worked! My news ones? Not a chance. I wish Apple would take interest in all its products to ensure they are of a

title: Great basic EarPods For an “old dog” nana
text: I’m a bit of an old dog with earbuds and such, but with my kids advice I bought these for a couple of reasons...to listen to music while walking, (which makes an enormous difference by the way lol) to watch Netflix when stuck waiting, and to listen  to rain sounds when my husbands snoring drives me nuts. (They don’t block the sound entirely but with the right volume at least I can stay in the room.)  These basically opened up a whole new world for me and work great. I was warned to keep them away from the cat because he would ruin them immediately, and I do treat them with care. They are inexpensive but bring me great joy! Very comfortable and great sound.

title: Perfect!
text: I bought these for my daughters iPhone SE. They work great, she’s had no issues with them. Good sound quality, she loves them. I would recommend.

title: Faulty Headphones
text: Thought that ordering this with the "Sold by/Fulfilled" by Amazon would be worth the risk given the reviews but less than a week after owning these headphones, I'm already having issues with them. The volume/play+pause buttons will randomly stop working and I have to plug and replug them multiple times to regain a connection. The sound also drops out and starts playing out of my iPhone X fairly frequently. Never had these issues with the headphones that came w/ my phone originally.

title: Not Sure If They're Authentic
text: I'm not sure if these are a genuine Apple product. They look just like the originals that came with my husband's iPhone but they dont have any Apple logo or standard Apple packaging. However, mu husband says they work great and sound just like the originals so he is happy with them. For the price, they're great. Usually these go for twice the price in the Apple store.

title: No complaints...
text:
Tried several non-Apple headphones before and most never last as long, nor sound as good to me.

I don't mind it being corded, as opposed to wireless, plus it's much more cheaper than wireless, and there's no batteries to replace. Plus, you can't replace the batteries on a wireless model and basically have to throw them away in the trash when it no longer holds a charge.

This headphones are NOT noise cancelling headphones, but when listening to music, it does a good job of reducing outside noise.

Definitely will buy again (as long as Apple keeps selling these).

title: I love these wired earbuds
text: These earbuds arrived promptly, in the original packaging, sounding great.  I prefer them to the later wireless ones, because if one or both fall out, I still don't lose them.

title: Doesn’t last long
text: I’m not sure if these are authentic from Apple or not but they didn’t last me long. Only about 3 months. I’m not someone who uses headphones every single day only about 2-3 times a week. I’ve probably used these about twice a week for talking on the phone for a short amount of time. So I don’t understand why they suddenly went out. I always kept them in a case free of water or anything that could damage them. They were always clean. I’ve had a pair of Apple headphones that came with my older iPhone for about a year and a half until they went out. When I upgraded I was sad that Apple no longer included their headphones so this is what prompted this purchase. I will not recommend and I certainly will not purchase again.

title: Real and brand new
text: Make sure it says shipped and sold by Amazon. Mine is the real deal and brand new. Works perfectly. Thanks

title: Nice earbuds
text:
Actual Apple earbuds. Come packages from Apple. So far so good.
Good sound and pretty comfortable in my ears

title: don't waste you money
text: I purchase two sets of these earbuds.  I gave one to my daughter and today her right ear bud is not working.  I open the other one for myself and they were not working.  I sent mines back the next and asked for a replacement and i received it.  replacement worked for until yesterday and the right ear bud is not working just like my daughter's .  I don't know if this a Apple ear bud defective of the ones purchase from this seller are not good.

title: Garbage
text: Absolute waste. Had to continuously disconnect and reconnect to hear sound. Can't control the volume with the headphones. Doesn't work to make phone calls.  Absolute trash and couldn't even get my money back for this. They wanted me to pay more just to send it back. Utter nonsense and trash behavior for a seller. SMH.

title: Fully used earbuds...
text: yeah thought I was buying new earbuds and they came fully used, and not working in both ears, with earwax in the buds. wtf

title: Good fit, and the batteries never die.
text: Such a bold move by Tim Apple to push everybody towards Bluetooth AirPods for $100 more than wired headphones. But the batteries never die with my wired set, whereas I can only get 2-3 hours with my AirPods.

title: The real deal
text: These arrived in standard apple packaging with an unbroken seal. Everything looks and functions just like you would expect from Apple. The sound quality on the mic and the headphones is excellent. I bought these to replace a pair of AirPods Pro that I sent through the washing machine and find that I line the fit of these better (the pro version has rubber tips which make them prone to sliding out of my ears). And while the corded version is less cool than the wireless ones I actually enjoy it more because I never have to worry about my headphones being charged or breaking the Bluetooth connection. I have a gen 1 version of the AirPods where the left one often loses connection and when that happens it pauses whatever you are listening to. With these that won’t happen. The biggest downsides to the corded version I have experienced is that you can’t pair it to the Apple Watch, and if you need to charge your phone with the lightning port then you can’t use the headphones until you are done

title: It’s ok
text: Normal apple headphone quality

title: I’m starting to use this again
text: because the airpods always run out of battery when I need it so I'm trying to buy this one which I can use anytime. Of course sound quality is good

title: Oldie but goodie for my iphone 12
text: My kids love their AirPod Pros, but I still love using the earbuds. They work great and are much cheaper!

title: Authentic
text:
I understand why the reviews question the authenticity of the product. When I first received it, the wires were so flimsy and frail that I also questioned if it was a genuine Apple product. But it is! Apple’s quality has gone downhill. These aren’t nearly as durable as the 3.5mm headphones they used to sell several years back. The sound quality is better by a margin, but I can’t expect these ear buds to last even 1 year.

UPDATE: I rarely give 1 star reviews, but after 2 months of using these, they have become fairly useless. They constantly shock my ears with static, they pause and play my videos whenever the cord moves slightly, and they engage Siri randomly. There is nothing I can do with these.

title: Who has the ears for these
text: Something I have never understood with Apple earbuds is why they are shaped like that- I have never had an easy time fitting them in my ears let alone getting them to stay put. Unfortunately I can't even use these hardly at all because they will fall out. I wish Apple made speaker-type headphones because those actually fit in my ears.

title: it should come with the phone
text: apple should stop selling these separately

title: they came like new and works
text: They are used but I don't have any problems with them, they came like new and works perfect

title: Brand new perfect Genuine Apple Earpods.
text:
I just got these. They are Brand new, perfect, Genuine Apple Earpods. Gonna order another set.
Simple statement...

title: Difficult to Judge
text: I bought these for my partner who is an automotive tech. I can't tell if they broke quickly from the environment or because they were poor quality.. Other than them breaking in less than 2 months, sound quality and mic were excellent.

title: Excellent extra pair of headphones
text: I use them mostly on Zoom meetings and some music listening. They work great for both. I bought the lightning connector even though I have a phone with a 3.5 headset connection since the 3.5's will be going away. I would buy them again.

title: Sound great on an iPhone 8
text: I am very happy I ordered these headphones as I have always liked the sound of the original Apple headphones.  I just can’t believe I waited so long to get them.  I have several of the old headphones but ever since I got my iPhone 8 I have not tried the new headphones as I got them used and didn’t come with some. These help me use something while my Bose sport headphones charge. Very happy I got them.

title: Crystal clear
text: I use these to talk hands free on my commute.  Crystal clear for both parties

title: Genuine Apple product/ not a knock off.
text: Got 2. My girls 11 and 13 . I got them for them for good grades/ reward. They are genuine Apple product, good sound.

title: Seem to be the real deal
text: I don't know why this review asks for "battery life" as these are not battery-operated?  At any rate, these headphones work well, came packaged in an Apple box, and seem to be the real deal.  My original pair (that came with my iPhone X) died after about 18 months so I'm happy to have found this replacement that appears to be of identical quality.

title: Fine Headphones, but breaks so easily
text: The part of the wire that plugs into the phone started to break down a few months after purchase.

title: Not comfortable
text: These headphones keep popping out.  Very annoying.  Sound is good.  I would have returned them but, I missed the window.

title: Makes a weird noise
text: Look, I love these headphones, I've probably had twenty through the years (which says something about durability, anyways.) I prefer these to the fancy AirPods, all the way. The newest pair I got are weird though, if you bump into it while listening to music it pauses the song. Even worse, a couple of times it has made this deafening high-pitched noise. I think I just got a bad item, but it's still disappointing.

Love them!

title: Apple headphones work
text: Would recommend these Apple brand headphones.

title: Short product life
text: Sound quality is good while the ear buds last. The set I received with the Apple iPhone worked well for about three years, then one ear bud went dead.  The replacement set went for about a year before one bud died. The second replacement set lost the microphone in less than 6 months. It seems like concern for quality is deteriorating and the consumer pays, not to mention the environment as more stuff get chucked.

title: Good Price, Good Sound
text: Good Price, Good Sound. No problems in 3+ months.

title: Not reliable

title: Does the job
text: Does the job it is intended for

title: Apple Ear Pods
text: They will work.  They have no battery that I'm aware of.  They plug into my phone.  I would not buy these again unless it would be the only thing that worked to solve my issue.  My son told me to purchase these cause I couldn't hear my iphone well enough.  If there was a way to buy cordless and get the same affect, I would definitely go cordless. It's a pain switching out battery charger, and the iphone ear plug line.  Also, the plug for my ear doesn't fit my ear and slides out easily.

title: will not stay in my ears - over priced
text: I bought these directly from the Apple store to make sure I had the authentic Apple product.  The sound is comparable to the cheaper ear buds I bought before I changed my phone to one that required a lightening connector for earbuds.  These are okay as long as I don't move around but fall out if I am active.  I can't understand why Apple thinks they can design a hard plastic earbud that fits everyone's ears.  I have to keep buying silicone covers to make them stay in.  Because the covers stretch and fall off after a short time, I've probably spent as much on covers as I did for the earpods. The brands with a soft plastic cover stay in much better and are a lot cheaper.

title: The Apex of Affordable and Quality
text: I got these during a Prime Day sale event for about 14$(usually they’re 20$). They are Apple quality wired so, naturally the sound is great and devoid of bluetooth-related losses. They are great and at least last like a year before you might consider replacing them. There’s better out there, but these don’t leave to much for one to desire for wired earbuds(unless maybe, if your not a IPhone user).

title: Love These!
text: Best EarPods! Sound is amazing and I don't have to worry about where I've left my lightning adapter. My ears reject earpods of all shapes and sizes so there's no way I'm investing in wireless EarPods.  If these fall out, which they rarely do, they are still conveniently connected to me and my phone. My mom has anti-earpod ears, too, so I ordered a set for her and she loves them.  Such a great buy.

title: Great replacement headphones for my iPhone
text: I used my old iPhone headphones for years until they quite literally fell apart, so it was time to replace them. I ordered these from Amazon, and they are the same Apple quality headphones I love. They work great, are as good as the originals, and plug right into my phone using the lightning port. The only difference is that these headphones did not come in a plastic box like the last pair. These were in a cardboard one. But I rarely kept the headphones in the plastic box anyway, so it's not a big deal, it is just the only difference I can tell between these and my previous pair.
